questions.question: Explain the purpose of dynamic memory allocation. (2 marks)
keyPoints: Useful when memory requirements are not known at compile time

questions.question: Describe the differences between malloc() and calloc() functions. (5 marks)
keyPoints: malloc() allocates a single block of memory, calloc() allocates multiple blocks
malloc() does not initialize memory, calloc() initializes to zero
Use cases: malloc for single objects, calloc for arrays
